name: Post-Quantum Cipher Analysis
summary: Heimdall — finds assets in Tenable's Post-Quantum Cipher Analysis plugins (277650 not-PQ / 277652 cipher inventory / 277653 PQ-ready) and tags them Post-Quantum:Cipher Analysis. Also correlates cert crypto + transport + crypto-agility, weighted by ACR + CISA-KEV, into a ranked crown-jewel migration roadmap.
